title: Resolve duplicates circular dependency
goal: Break circular import between duplicates.ts and bulkDuplicates.ts using button ID constants extraction and factory injection.
in_scope: Create src/modules/duplicateButtonIDs.ts with pure constants (zero class imports)
Create src/modules/duplicatePaneUI.ts with registerButtonsInDuplicatePane(win, bulkFactory, nonDupFactory) and updateDuplicateButtonsVisibilities(win)
duplicatePaneUI accepts button factories as parameters (not importing BulkDuplicates class)
Update bulkDuplicates.ts to import from duplicatePaneUI.ts and duplicateButtonIDs.ts
Wire factories in hooks.ts at call site
out_of_scope: Changing Duplicates or BulkDuplicates class logic
acceptance: duplicates.ts does NOT import from bulkDuplicates.ts
bulkDuplicates.ts does NOT import from duplicates.ts
duplicatePaneUI.ts does NOT import BulkDuplicates class
